subcodes.first_line: O Jím! Rejoice thou in what hath been recorded by the Pen of the Wronged One, and be thou of them that render praise. There hath appeared before the Face that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جیم ان افرح بما ذکرت من قلم المظلوم و کن من الحامدین قد حضر لدی الوجه ما
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat]
